relabelled_senses.definition: Literal curse meaning 'I defecate on your dead [relatives],' used as an obscene verbal attack.
Literal translation 'it peels it for me,' not used in a literal sense and generally meaningless outside the idiom.
Literal rendering 'it sweats me,' not used literally and carrying no literal meaning outside the idiom.
Literal: to laugh so hard that one wets oneself.
Literal: in the middle of nowhere; located in an isolated or remote place far from towns or landmarks.
To masturbate (of a male); to stimulate one's own penis sexually.
Literally 'less bad'; indicating that something is not as bad as it could have been.
To mention the rope in the house of the hanged (literal phrasing of the proverb).
To lie in the manner of a 'bellaco' (a scoundrel or rogue) (literal wording).
Literally, the act of putting a paw or foot in; a figurative extension of physically putting one's foot somewhere inappropriate.
To see or perceive something out of the corner of the eye without turning the head; a sideways glance.
To urinate involuntarily in bed during sleep (bedwetting).
Completely naked or stripped of clothing or possessions.
To put on a brief, attention-seeking performance or display, literally staging a small act or skit.
To take up guard duty or stand watch, remaining alert to protect a place, person, or group.
To organize, produce, or put on a public entertainment event or performance.
To invent or fabricate stories or scenarios, often to explain, justify, or imagine events that did not occur.
Literal: to bite the dust; to fall dead or die.
